title: Dutch Chicken Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole made with chicken, vegetables, and a rich Dutch cheese sauce. Perfect for a chilly evening.

ingredients.name: boneless, skinless chicken breast or thighs

instructions: In a large skillet, sauté the chopped onion, celery, and mushroom in butter until the vegetables are tender.
Add the flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Slowly add the chicken broth and cream, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until it thickens.
Stir in the shredded Dutch cheese until melted.
Season the chicken with salt and pepper, then add it to the skillet and cook until browned on both sides.
Transfer the chicken to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Pour the cheese sauce over the chicken and top with additional Dutch cheese if desired.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the casserole is hot and the cheese is bubbly.
